popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  Princess of Naples and Sicily

** from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/SICILY.htm#Margueritedied1299 as of 7/21/2016

MARGUERITE of Sicily ([1273]-31 Dec 1299, bur Paris, église des Jacobins). …

sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - MARGUERITE of Sicily ([1273]-31 Dec 1299, bur Paris, église des Jacobins).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite d'Anjou於1272年出生在義大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里時，她的父親Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples18歲，母親Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples15歲。她於1290年8月16日與Charles de Valois comte de Valois在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內可貝爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1299年12月31日在法國皮卡迪艾斯隆朋特享年27歲，埋葬在法國瑟芭黎絲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite d'Anjou于1272年出生在意大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里时，她的父亲Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples18岁，母亲Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples15岁。她于1290年8月16日与Charles de Valois comte de Valois在法国哈帕格-亞登芒內可貝爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1299年12月31日在法国皮卡迪艾斯隆朋特享年27岁，埋葬在法国瑟芭黎絲。

nameMeanings.name: d'Anjou
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone from Anjou, a former province of western France (see Langevin ).

variants.name: Langevin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Normand, Andre, Henri, Jean-Louis, Pierre, Adelard, Emile, Gaston, Leodore, Lucien, Marcel.

French: habitational name, with fused definite article l', for an Angevin, i.e. for someone from Anjou, a former province of western France that was ruled by a count as an independent territory from the 10th century. The province became a property of the English Crown for fifty years at the end of the 12th century. Compare Longway and Lonsway .

History: Mathurin Langevin dit Lacroix from Le Lude in Sarthe, France, married Marie-Thérèse Martin in Quebec City, QC, in 1674. Michel Langevin from Paris, France, married Marguerite Guertin in Contrecoeur, QC, in 1714. Jean Bergevin dit Langevin from Angers in Maine-et-Loire, France, married Marie Piton in Quebec City, QC, in 1668. Charles Citoleux/Sitoleux dit Langevin from Chambellay in Maine-et-Loire, France, married Marie-Louise Harel in Montreal, QC, in 1739.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite d'Anjou was born in 1272, in Naples, Campania, Italy, her father, Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples, was 18 and her mother, Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples, was 15. She married Charles de Valois comte de Valois on 16 August 1290, in Corbeil, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 31 December 1299, in Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, France, at the age of 27, and was buried in Paris, Seine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite d'Anjou est née en 1272, à Napoli, Campania, Italie, son père, Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Charles de Valois comte de Valois le 16 août 1290, à Corbeil, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 31 décembre 1299, à Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterrée à Paris, Seine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite d'Anjou 1272 in Napoli, Campania, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples 18 und ihre Mutter Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples 15. Sie hat am 16. August 1290 in Corbeil, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich Charles de Valois comte de Valois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. Dezember 1299 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich und wurde in Paris, Seine, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite d'Anjou è nata il nel 1272 nel Napoli, Campania, Italia, sua padre, Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Charles de Valois comte de Valois il 16 agosto 1290, nel Corbeil, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 31 dicembre 1299, nel Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolta a Paris, Seine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite d'Anjouが1272年にイタリアカンプアニアナポリで生まれた時，父Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naplesは18歳，母Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naplesは15歳であった。1290年8月16日にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンコルベイルでCharles de Valois comte de Valoisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1299年12月31日にフランスピカーディエイスンロングプオントで27歳で死去し，フランスセアインパーイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite d'Anjou(이)가 1272년 이탈리아 캠파니아 나폴리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1290년 8월 16일 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 코르브일에서 Charles de Valois comte de Valois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1299년 12월 31일 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 론그폰트에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세이인 파리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite d'Anjou nasceu em 1272, em Napoli, Campania, Itália, seu pai, Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Charles de Valois comte de Valois em 16 de agosto de 1290, em Corbeil, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 31 de dezembro de 1299, em Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, França, com 27 anos, e foi sepultada em Paris, Seine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite d'Anjou родилась в 1272 г. в местности наполи, кампаня, Италия, её отцу по имени Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Charles de Valois comte de Valois 16 августа 1290 г. в местности корбил, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 31 декабря 1299 г. в местности лонгпонт, эисн, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 27 лет и была похоронена в местности пэрис, син, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite d'Anjou nació en 1272, en Napoli, Campania, Italia, su papá, Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Charles de Valois comte de Valois el 16 de agosto de 1290, en Corbeil, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 31 de diciembre de 1299, en Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 27 años, y fue sepultada en Paris, Seine, Francia.
